{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202510675EA36F5DE5C96C3FEF4"}"},"total":1988},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7432850160422585112","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的综影视小说，作者文笔逻辑都非常好。爽文感不足，女主穿越那么多影视世界，绝大多数都没有原剧情，作为综穿类小说，感觉这一点削弱有点不爽。而且作者在其中总加一些女主心理活动，如，那谁谁听着怪熟悉的，那谁谁不就是那什么剧里的角色，但又一知半解，看得读者有点着急。女主穿越的角色基本都是作者在符合逻辑背景情况下的原创角色，很自然地融入到了主角团中。小说总体格调比较温馨、日常，对于想看女强爽文的读者而言，可能稍稍有点不足。但不可否认，这是一本很不错的综穿小说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730601294,"group_id":"7284772743344557112","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"塑造不同的角色体验不一样的人生~","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0hAzEjJ7hlIcJmvtDJPDnU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7a97f75585a84ee5a6fd4780f44c2ed1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701361&x-signature=Lw6lp5fVM7pLinNO9sk2rMtGJBk%3D","user_id":"54714960767","user_name":"熠熠生辉yysh"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"54714960767","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1777190266,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":36,"name":"马上发帖","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bac86db20ea02e8e0eb989703e0d9a43","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3870c3280f5de1e0496c3327d86d111d"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7284772743344557112","book_info":{"abstract":"（本人已完结文《综穿带着系统做宠妃》有影视，有架空）
常绵绵被系统带进了小世界里，完成任务后可获得现金奖励和一项技能，小世界都是影视世界，可常绵绵表示自己不爱看电视剧啊……
1.甄嬛传
2.三生三世十里桃花
3.知否
4.我的人间烟火
5.莲花楼
6.星汉灿烂
7.如懿传
8.长月烬明
9.欢乐颂
10.倚天屠龙记
11.情深深雨蒙蒙
12.三生世界
